projectDescription: A comprehensive school management platform built for Kenyan educational institutions, digitising academics, attendance, finance, inventory, and events in one unified system.
keyFeatures: Full academic lifecycle management: assessments, grading, and report cards
Attendance tracking for students, teachers, and staff with follow-up workflows
M-Pesa STK Push integration for fee payments
Per-student digital wallet with credit/debit tracking
Inventory and procurement management with low-stock alerts
School events management with targeted attendee notifications
Role-based access for principals, teachers, HODs, staff, and guardians
Automated email and in-app notifications for all key events
Bulk CSV imports for students, guardians, grades, invoices, and inventory
Downloadable reports for academics, finance, and inventory
Module-based feature gating (Starter, Base, Full, or Custom plans)
publicApiSurface: POST /api/mpesa/stk-push — initiate M-Pesa STK Push payment
